title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 45
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost keys.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you finally find your keys? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Girl: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the gym locker, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Woman: And did you try the bike basket? You said you went there afterwards. || Girl: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my brother sent me a message and said [1]I had left my keys in my jacket pocket[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Woman: What a relief. You will need it later. || Girl: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your keys? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the gym locker, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you try the bike basket? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my brother sent me a message and said I had left my keys in my jacket pocket. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where are the keys?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the keys in my jacket pocket.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to see the football match after school? I was looking forward to it. || Boy: I don't think so. The match has been moved to Sunday, so that plan will not work today. || Man: We could go to the cinema instead. That might be fun. || Boy: I checked, but the only film starts too late. My cousin had a different idea: [1]we are going to play table tennis at the youth club this afternoon[/1]. || Man: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Boy: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are we still going to see the football match after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The match has been moved to Sunday, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We could go to the cinema instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but the only film starts too late. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to play table tennis at the youth club this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to play table tennis at the youth club this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the sports day.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the sports day tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Man: Almost. I was going to bring a racket, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Woman: What about a packed lunch? Do we need that? || Man: Not this time. The message says [1]everyone needs to bring a water bottle because there are no drinks available on the field[/1]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Man: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the sports day tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a racket, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about a packed lunch? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring a water bottle because there are no drinks available on the field.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring a water bottle because there are no drinks available on the field.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Boy: Not yet. I considered the chocolate cake, but I do not want anything sweet. || Girl: What about the toast? It looks good today. || Boy: I thought about that too, but it will not fill me up. I think [1]I'll have the cheese omelette because I am really hungry[/1]. || Girl: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Boy: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the chocolate cake, but I do not want anything sweet.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What about the toast? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it will not fill me up. I think I'll have the cheese omelette because I am really hungry.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the cheese omelette because I am really hungry.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the school choir.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you see the message about the school choir this afternoon? I was going straight to the music room. || Man: Do not go there, because the piano is being repaired. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Woman: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the hall. || Man: That is wrong too, because chairs are being arranged for tomorrow. The latest message says [1]we must meet in room fourteen after lunch[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Man: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the school choir this afternoon? I was going straight to the music room.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because the piano is being repaired. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the hall.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because chairs are being arranged for tomorrow. The latest message says we must meet in room fourteen after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the school choir?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in room fourteen after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the swimming pool.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting to the swimming pool tomorrow? I thought you were going to go by bike. || Girl: I was, but the tyre is flat, so it is not a good idea now. || Boy: Could you take the train instead? It might be quicker. || Girl: I checked, but the station is too far away. [1]I'm taking the bus because it leaves from the end of my road[/1]. || Boy: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Girl: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the swimming pool tomorrow? I thought you were going to go by bike.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I was, but the tyre is flat, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Could you take the train instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but the station is too far away. I'm taking the bus because it leaves from the end of my road.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the swimming pool?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because it leaves from the end of my road.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the hotel.
items.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the hotel this afternoon? I thought you had to carry suitcases. || Man: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Woman: So are you going to clean rooms instead? || Man: No, because the rooms are not empty yet. The manager said [1]my job today is to prepare the breakfast tables[/1]. || Woman: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Man: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the hotel this afternoon? I thought you had to carry suitcases.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So are you going to clean rooms instead?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, because the rooms are not empty yet. The manager said my job today is to prepare the breakfast tables.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to prepare the breakfast tables.
